text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where did I leave my water bottle for
training camp? I just refilled it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! Have you seen my toiletries?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Could that be the pouch with super-marvelous
polka-dots?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I may or may not have seen it in my bag! ☆ But it
may or may not be mine! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yup, that's it. Gosh.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's okay as long as Marvelous has it. All
right, let's head to the bus.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Waaaait! Nature, aren't you taking those babies?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
The origami trophies in your closet! ☆ Nature's
marvelous treasures! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what?! H-how did you know about those?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed you looking at them with a biiiig
smile night after night! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gahhh! You were watching me?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, forget whatever you saw! I'm leaving those!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're blushing! ☆ Even your shy face is
marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's enough! Come on, everyone is waiting for
us, so let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: To summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... It's so hot every time I come here...
choice_data_list:
We've got a race coming up, so let's give this
camp everything we've got!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...It's nothiiing. I was just thinking that you're
right.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho, followed by the Arima
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
These are both big races. Yup, that's one heavy
burden on my shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But... if I do everything I can at this training
camp, maybe... I can win...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Either way, I will get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Getting a bit too passionate here. I blame the
sun.

And so, Nice Nature's blazing hot summer camp
has begun!
